OTPC

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x21b40000
Size:
0x48
Source:
otp_rf.rdl

Description

OTP Controller — programs and reads the one-time-programmable fuse array. Trigger reads by writing rd_addr_size then the magic word 0x6ACCACC6 to cmd_word. Trigger writes by writing wr_data_mask then 0x9ACCACC9 to cmd_word. Trigger pgm-lock by writing 0x10C610C6 to cmd_word.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x13 - -
0x14 rd_addr_size -
0x18 rd_packet -
0x1C op_status -
0x20 clear_status_int -
0x24 - -
0x30 glb_ctrl -
0x34 cmd_word -
0x38 status -
0x3C chip_ctrl -
0x40 np_pulse_num -
0x44 wr_data_mask -
